:::{.cards-grid .cards-grid--top}
:::{.info-card .info-card--course}
<div class="info-card__header">
  <span class="info-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <img src="img/icons/book-stack.svg" alt="" class="info-card__icon-img">
  </span>
  <h2 class="info-card__heading">Course content</h2>
</div>

:::{.card-copy}
"Open Science in the Swedish Context" is designed to teach DDLS research school scientists how to apply Swedish Open Science standards in their daily research.

The course covers key stages of the research lifecycle, from planning a research project and sharing results to science communication, researcher evaluation, and collaborative practice.

Participants will explore open access publishing, research data sharing, researcher evaluation criteria, and citizen science as part of a more open and collaborative research culture.
:::
:::

:::{.info-card .info-card--outcomes}
<div class="info-card__header">
  <span class="info-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <img src="img/icons/target.svg" alt="" class="info-card__icon-img">
  </span>
  <h2 class="info-card__heading">Learning outcomes</h2>
</div>

:::{.card-copy}
1. Get acquainted with Open Science principles and how they are being implemented across Swedish academia.
2. Develop a foundational understanding of how to apply Open Science practices at key stages of a research project.
3. Identify practical actions that make your research outputs more open, reusable, and collaborative.
:::
:::

:::{.info-card .info-card--topics}
<div class="info-card__header">
  <span class="info-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <img src="img/icons/lightbulb.svg" alt="" class="info-card__icon-img">
  </span>
  <h2 class="info-card__heading">Topics covered</h2>
</div>

:::{.card-copy}
- Open research planning and project design
- FAIR data and responsible sharing practices
- Open access publishing and science communication
- Research assessment, citizen science, and collaborative research
- Creating and maintaining engagement
:::
:::

:::{.info-card .info-card--keywords}
<div class="info-card__header">
  <span class="info-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <img src="img/icons/tag.svg" alt="" class="info-card__icon-img">
  </span>
  <h2 class="info-card__heading">Keywords</h2>
</div>

:::{.card-copy}
- Open Science
- FAIR data
- Open Access
- Citizen science
:::
:::
:::
